title: centaurea kermanshahensis
intro: Centaurea kermanshahensis, also known as Iranian knapweed or Kermanshah centaury, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Centaurea kermanshahensis include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
